query: SELECT s.stageCode, s.nameAr, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lifecycle_services ls WHERE ls.stageCode = s.stageCode) as serviceCount FROM lifecycle_stages s WHERE s.isActive = 1 ORDER BY s.sortOrder
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT s.stageCode, s.nameAr, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lifecycle_services ls WHERE ls.stageCode = s.stageCode) as serviceCount FROM lifecycle_stages s WHERE s.isActive = 1 ORDER BY s.sortOrder
